summary: Tested unified Artikel/Leistung/Fremdleistung feature. All backend APIs (11/11 tests) and frontend features working correctly. Migration complete with 7 items (4 Artikel + 3 Leistung). VK price calculation, type filtering, subunternehmer field, and WYSIWYG sidebar integration all functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/articles returns all 7 items (4 Artikel + 3 Leistung)
Backend: GET /api/articles?typ=Artikel filters correctly (4 items)
Backend: GET /api/articles?typ=Leistung filters correctly (3 items)
Backend: GET /api/articles?typ=Fremdleistung filters correctly (0 items)
Backend: POST /api/articles creates item with calculated VK prices (ek * (1 + aufschlag/100))
Backend: POST /api/articles with typ=Fremdleistung saves subunternehmer field
Backend: PUT /api/articles/{id} updates item and recalculates VK prices
Backend: DELETE /api/articles/{id} deletes item successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/articles/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: VK calculation returns 0 when ek_preis is 0
Backend: /api/services endpoint still works (backward compatibility)
Frontend: Artikel page loads with unified list (data-testid=artikel-page)
Frontend: Type filter tabs work (Alle, Artikel, Leistung, Fremdleistung)
Frontend: Create modal has Typ selection buttons (Artikel/Leistung/Fremdleistung)
Frontend: Subunternehmer field appears only for Fremdleistung type
Frontend: EK-Preis + 3 Aufschlag % inputs with live VK calculation
Frontend: Navigation shows single 'Artikel' item (no 'Leistungen')
Frontend: /services redirects to /articles
Frontend WYSIWYG: Sidebar has Leistungen (3) and Artikel (4) tabs
Frontend WYSIWYG: Clicking item opens detail panel with price info
Frontend WYSIWYG: 'Ins Dokument' button adds position to document with correct price
Frontend WYSIWYG: Toast notification confirms item added
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST items during backend testing (TEST_VK_Calculation, TEST_Fremdleistung, TEST_Update_VK, TEST_Delete_Item, TEST_Zero_VK)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Artikel/Leistung/Fremdleistung feature fully implemented and working. 7 items exist in database (4 Artikel + 3 Leistung, 0 Fremdleistung). VK price calculation formula: ek_preis * (1 + aufschlag/100). Subunternehmer field only visible for Fremdleistung type. WYSIWYG sidebar shows unified data with Leistungen and Artikel tabs. 'Ins Dokument' button (data-testid=btn-add-item-{id}) adds position to document. Navigation has single 'Artikel' item, /services redirects to /articles.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as implemented
